sections.label: Introduction
sections.instruction: Introduce yourself professionally. A clear photo and bio go a long way.

fields.name: role
fields.label: Your Role
fields.instruction: Your job title or area of expertise.

fields.name: tagline
fields.label: Tagline
fields.instruction: A short, memorable sentence about your work.
fields.placeholder: Designing interfaces people love to use.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Short Bio
fields.instruction: 2-3 sentences about yourself and your experience.
fields.placeholder: I'm a designer-developer hybrid with 4 years of experience building user-friendly products. I care deeply about accessibility, clean code, and thoughtful interactions.

fields.name: profileImage
fields.label: Profile Photo
fields.instruction: Clear headshot — shown as circular image.

fields.name: resumeLink
fields.label: Resume
fields.instruction: Upload your resume as a PDF (max 5MB).

fields.name: openToWork
fields.label: Open to Work
fields.instruction: Shows an availability badge in the navbar.

sections.label: Projects
sections.instruction: Showcase your best work. Add 2 to 6 projects.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.instruction: What it does and what makes it interesting.
fields.placeholder: A clean, intuitive expense tracking app with real-time charts and budget alerts...

fields.name: stack
fields.label: Tech Stack
fields.instruction: Type a technology and press Enter to add.

fields.name: images
fields.label: Project Screenshot
fields.instruction: Upload one screenshot or banner image for this project.

fields.name: items
fields.label: Skills
fields.instruction: Type a skill and press Enter to add.
